div.p: Documentation, integration guides, and protocol specs.

Tempo is a general-purpose blockchain optimized for payments. Tempo is designed to be a low-cost, high-throughput blockchain with user and developer features that we believe should be core to a modern payment system.

a.div: Set up a wallet, run your first transaction.

div.div:
# Tempo
Documentation, integration guides, and protocol specs.
Tempo is a general-purpose blockchain optimized for payments. Tempo is designed to be a low-cost, high-throughput blockchain with user and developer features that we believe should be core to a modern payment system.
- [Create a Wallet](/wallet) - [Connect to Tempo](/connect) - [Make Payments](/payments) - [Agentic Payments](/agentic)
